understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the current level by navigating the player on a tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding any spikes that would immediately end the run, within the 2 attempts and 50-turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which the character automatically continues moving in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a hazard (like spikes 'u'/'v'), or reaching the goal '+'. CLICK can be used on specific breakable/clickable blocks (like 'x') at a given [x,y] to remove them and open new fall paths; clicks do not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Gravity direction determines which way the auto-fall occurs after a horizontal move, and landing on spikes immediately fails the attempt/episode.
